summary: Police station locations for the Australian Capital Territory, published by the Australian Federal Police. Includes name, address, city, and zip code for each station.
Registry of surveyors currently licensed in the ACT, including registration number, home jurisdiction, and names.
Catalog of public artworks in the ACT with location, medium, artist, acquisition details, and commission information by suburb.
Public register of building and pest inspections in the ACT, covering inspector name, inspection type, address, date, and suburb.
ACT Government contracts register updated monthly, listing contractor names, ABNs, contract numbers, procurement methodology, and spending amounts.
Traffic counter data for ACT parks and conservation areas tracking pedestrian and cyclist counts at locations like Mt Ainslie, Kambah Pool, and Black Mountain.
Air quality monitoring data for the ACT including AQI readings for ozone, PM2.5, and PM10 at multiple monitoring sites with GPS coordinates.
Inventory of arts facilities in the ACT with addresses, URLs, suburb, and zip codes for each facility.
Water quality compliance results for ACT lakes and rivers in 2018-19, measuring faecal enterococci levels and overall compliance status by site.
ACT public school term dates and public holidays by year, including term descriptions and jurisdiction details.
Historical record of ACT Chief Ministers including name, party affiliation, term dates, and length of service.
ACT capital works budget for 2020-2021 listing projects by directorate, region, type, and budgeted financing across multiple years.
ACT capital works budget review for 2018-2019 covering project classifications, estimated completion dates, and financing variations across years.
Historical ACT government contracts from 2000 to 2016, including contractor details, contract amounts, UNSPSC classifications, and procurement exemptions.
ACT capital works budget review for 2019-2020 with project names, directorates, regions, and multi-year financing amounts.
ACT capital works budget review for 2017-2018 covering project names, directorates, and financing across multiple future years.
Water quality compliance data for ACT recreational lakes and rivers in 2021-2022, measuring intestinal enterococci levels by site and suburb.
ACT government procurement tender responses received July-December 2019, listing suppliers, RFx numbers, closing dates, and directorates.
ACT government procurement tender responses received January-June 2019, listing suppliers, RFx titles, and closing dates.
Register of licensed professionals in the ACT including occupation, licence status, endorsement, expiry date, and COLA licence numbers.
Professional registration records for ACT practitioners including registration number, expiry date, business location, and names.
Summary statistics for ACT government administrative districts including district codes, names, area, and geographic geometry.
Water quality compliance monitoring for ACT recreational lakes and rivers in 2025-26, tracking enterococci results by site and date.
ACT Emergency Services Agency incident records for 2011-2013, covering fire, ambulance, SES, and RFS incidents geocoded to suburb centroids.
Burden of disease data for ACT by broad disease groups, reporting DALYs, years lived with disability, years of life lost, deaths, and age-standardized rates by sex.
ACT recreational lakes and rivers intestinal enterococci compliance data for 2022-23, with microbial results, algae results, and final compliance by site.
ACT recreational lakes and rivers water quality compliance monitoring for 2023-2024, tracking enterococci and algae results by site and suburb.
ACT Emergency Services Agency incident records for 2008-2010, covering fire, ambulance, SES, and RFS incidents geocoded to suburb centroids.
Census enrollment counts by school in the ACT, broken down by year level and category.
Obesity and overweight prevalence data for ACT Year 6 students from the ACTPANS survey, segmented by region, sex, age, and year.
ACT BMI indicator data for 2021 by age, sex, region, and demographic subgroup, tracking weight status across the population.
Geographic data for beaches and swimming areas in the ACT, including location, division name, and spatial geometry.
ACT Emergency Services Agency incident records for 2004-2007, covering fire, ambulance, SES, and RFS incidents geocoded to suburb centroids.
ACT 2021 self-rated health survey results by sex, age group, and region, including confidence intervals and relative standard error.
ACT Emergency Services Agency incident records for 2014-2016, covering fire, ambulance, SES, and RFS incidents geocoded to suburb centroids.
Total burden of disease (DALYs, YLL, YLD) by Australian state and territory for 2018, measuring years of healthy life lost.
ACT recreational lakes and rivers water quality compliance for 2024-25, tracking enterococci and algae results by named site and date.
ABS National Health Survey 2018 data on overweight and obesity rates in Australia, comparing measured vs self-reported percentages.
National Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Health Survey 2018-2019 self-rated health results by indicator and region.
ACT General Health Survey combined obesity and weight status data from 2011-2021 by sex, age, region, and year.
